title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, November 29 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 29/11/2022
Image reference: 2022-11-29_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-november-29-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values have remained stable. Capesize Aquataine (181,700 DWT, Sep 2010, Imabari) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 24.75 mil, VV Value USD 25.15 mil - BWTS. Panamax DL Carnation (81,800 DWT, Sep 2014, Jiangsu Eastern) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 18.80 mil, VV Value USD 18.68 mil - DD Passed.
